    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1152,
            "text": "2. Calls &#96;mihomo.patch_base_config(\u0026json_value)&#96; - so it patches the **core's** config with just the mode. The core (mihomo) then uses that mode to decide which proxy group to use (GLOBAL for global, DIRECT for direct)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1153,
            "text": "3. Updates Config::clash() with the mode and saves, refreshes tray."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1155,
            "text": "The user wants a different behavior:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1156,
            "text": "- When switching to direct or global, **don't** just set mode on the core (which would make the core use GLOBAL group or DIRECT) - instead, **modify the runtime config** that is sent to the core: replace rules and dns, then push the full config to the core. So the \"mode\" in the config would still be \"rule\" from the core's perspective (or we need to not use the core's mode for routing). Actually re-reading the user message:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1158,
            "text": "\"当使用直连模式或者全局模式的时候你就把运行中的配置它的规则给改掉就好了\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1159,
            "text": "So when in direct/global mode, change the **running config's** rules (and dns). So the flow would be:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1160,
            "text": "1. When user selects \"direct\": we need to take the current runtime config, set rules to only &#96;[\"MATCH,⬆️\"]&#96;, remove nameserver-policy, set nameserver to the 3 Chinese DNS, then apply this config to the core. The mode in verge/clash config can stay \"direct\" for UI. The core doesn't need a \"mode\" switch - the rules already force all to DIRECT (⬆️)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1161,
            "text": "2. When user selects \"global\": set rules to only &#96;[\"MATCH,🔀\"]&#96;, remove nameserver-policy, set nameserver to the 4 global DNS, apply."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1162,
            "text": "3. When user selects \"rule\": we need to **restore** the original rules and dns from the profile (re-generate config from profile). So we need to either keep a copy of the \"rule mode\" config or re-run Config::generate() when switching back to rule."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1164,
            "text": "So the implementation:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1165,
            "text": "1. **Backend (feat/clash.rs)**: In &#96;change_clash_mode&#96;:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1166,
            "text": "   - For \"direct\": get runtime config, patch it with rules = [[\"MATCH\", \"⬆️\"]], dns: remove nameserver-policy, set nameserver to the 3 servers. Then we need to **apply** this patched config to the core. But the runtime config is generated from profiles - if we patch runtime and then call update_config(), the next time Config::generate() runs it would overwrite our patch. So we need to either: (A) store \"mode\" and in the config generation (enhance) when mode is direct/global, produce the simplified rules+dns; or (B) patch runtime config and apply to core without persisting that patch to the draft (so generate() still has the full config, but we push a modified version to core). Option (B) is tricky because update_config() reads from runtime. So (A): in the enhance/generate flow, when building the final config, if clash mode is direct or global, override rules and dns before writing to runtime and sending to core. That way we don't switch the proxy groups in the UI (we'd need to not change how we build proxy-groups), and we just override rules and dns in the generated config."
          }
        ],
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2884,
            "text": "2. If mode is \"direct\": replace config[\"rules\"] with [[\"MATCH\", \"⬆️\"]] and set dns nameserver + remove nameserver-policy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2885,
            "text": "3. If mode is \"global\": replace config[\"rules\"] with [[\"MATCH\", \"🔀\"]] and set dns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2886
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2887,
            "text": "And the UI: when in direct or global mode, don't switch the proxy groups - i.e. show the same groups as in rule mode. So we need to change the frontend to not treat global/direct as \"special\" for the proxy selector (we already did some of that with the highlight fix). The user said \"代理界面的这些group是不要进行切换的\" - so the groups in the proxy interface should not switch. So we need the proxy page and current-proxy-card to always show \"rule\" mode groups (all selector groups), not switch to a single GLOBAL group when in global mode. So:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2888,
            "text": "1. Backend: when generating runtime config, if mode is direct or global, override rules and dns as specified. We might need to keep the core mode as \"rule\" so it uses our rules, or we could keep setting mode to global/direct and the core would use it - but then the core might ignore our rules. So the clean approach is: when mode is direct or global, we still set mode to \"rule\" in the core and only override the config (rules + dns). So we need to:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2889,
            "text": "   - In change_clash_mode: still save the user's choice (global/direct) in Config::clash() so the UI shows the right mode."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2890,
            "text": "   - When generating config: if mode is direct or global, after building the full config, override rules and dns. And when applying to core, set the core's mode to \"rule\" (so it uses our overridden rules). So we need to not call patch_base_config with \"global\"/\"direct\" - we need to patch the config that gets sent to the core. So the flow would be:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2891,
            "text": "   - User selects \"direct\" -\u003e we call something that: (1) saves mode=direct in clash config, (2) regenerates config with rules=[MATCH,⬆️] and dns overrides, (3) applies config to core with mode=rule (or leave mode as rule). So we need to change how we \"apply\" config when mode is direct/global: we don't just patch_base_config(mode), we need to regenerate the full config with overrides and then update the core with that config. So the flow is:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2892,
            "text": "   - change_clash_mode(mode): save mode in Config::clash(), then call Config::generate() to regenerate (which will now apply direct/global overrides), then CoreManager::update_config() to push the new config to core. And we might need to set the core mode to \"rule\" so it uses the rules we sent. Let me check - when we update config, does the core get the full config including mode? If we send mode: rule and rules: [MATCH,⬆️], the core will use rule mode and our rules. Good."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2892
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2883
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1699,
            "text": "2. **Implement the mode by modifying the running config's rules** (and DNS):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1700,
            "text": "   - **Direct mode**: "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1701,
            "text": "     - Replace all rules with just &#96;- MATCH,⬆️&#96; (⬆️ is the direct proxy)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1702,
            "text": "     - Delete &#96;nameserver-policy&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1703,
            "text": "     - Set &#96;nameserver&#96; to:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1704,
            "text": "       - https://dns.alidns.com/dns-query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1705,
            "text": "       - https://120.53.53.53/dns-query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1706,
            "text": "       - tls://119.29.29.29:853"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1707,
            "text": "   - **Global mode**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1708,
            "text": "     - Replace all rules with just &#96;- MATCH,🔀&#96; (🔀 is the global proxy)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1709,
            "text": "     - Delete &#96;nameserver-policy&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1710,
            "text": "     - Set &#96;nameserver&#96; to:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1711,
            "text": "       - https://1.1.1.1/dns-query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1712,
            "text": "       - https://8.8.8.8/dns-query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1713,
            "text": "       - https://9.9.9.9/dns-query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1714,
            "text": "       - tls://1.0.0.1:853"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1715
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1716,
            "text": "So the implementation approach is: when the user selects \"direct\" or \"global\" mode, the app should patch the **running/merged config** (the one that gets sent to the core) to override:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1717,
            "text": "- &#96;rules&#96; → single MATCH rule with the appropriate proxy (⬆️ for direct, 🔀 for global)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1718,
            "text": "- Remove &#96;nameserver-policy&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1719,
            "text": "- Set &#96;nameserver&#96; to the fixed list for that mode"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1720
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1721,
            "text": "I need to find:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1722,
            "text": "1. Where the mode is set (rule / global / direct) and how it's applied to the core"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1723,
            "text": "2. Where the config (rules, dns) is built and sent to the core"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1724,
            "text": "3. How to inject these overrides when mode is direct or global"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1725
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1726,
            "text": "Let me search for where clash config mode is used and where rules/dns are set."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1727,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1728
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1729,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1730
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1731,
            "text": "查找模式切换与运行配置（rules、dns）的构建与下发逻辑，以便在直连/全局模式下通过修改运行中配置的 rules 和 dns 实现，而不切换代理界面的 group。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1732
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1733
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1734,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1735
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1736,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"unknown\" data-tool-name=\"ripgrep_raw_search\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1737,
            "text": "\u003cdetails\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1738,
            "text": "\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **ripgrep_raw_search**\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1739
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1740
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1741,
            "text": "Parameters:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1742
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1743,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1744,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1745,
            "text": "  \"caseInsensitive\": false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1746,
            "text": "  \"path\": \"c:\\\\Users\\\\Ken-Narmal\\\\Desktop\\\\ClashMetaForAndroid\\\\clash-verge-rev\\\\src\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1747,
            "text": "  \"pattern\": \"mode.*global|mode.*direct|clashConfig\\\\.mode|setMode\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1748,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1749,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1750,
            "text": "Additional data:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1751
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1752,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1753,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1754,
            "text": "  \"isPruned\": true,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1755,
            "text": "  \"outputMode\": \"content\","
          }

          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "        binding.modeToggleGroup.addOnButtonCheckedListener { _, checkedId, isChecked -\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "            if (suppressModeToggleEmit) return@addOnButtonCheckedListener"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "            val mode = when {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "                !isChecked -\u003e null"

          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "                checkedId == R.id.rule_mode_btn -\u003e TunnelState.Mode.Rule"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "                checkedId == R.id.global_mode_btn -\u003e TunnelState.Mode.Global"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "                checkedId == R.id.direct_mode_btn -\u003e TunnelState.Mode.Direct"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "                else -\u003e return@addOnButtonCheckedListener"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,

          {
            "lineNumber": 128,

            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "        }"

          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        // 初始化超时选择按钮组：根据持久化的偏好恢复选中状态"

          {

            "lineNumber": 134,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package tunnel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"errors\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"strings\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "type TunnelMode int32"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// ModeMapping is a mapping for Mode enum"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "var ModeMapping = map[string]TunnelMode{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\tGlobal.String(): Global,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tRule.String():   Rule,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\tDirect.String(): Direct,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "const ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tGlobal TunnelMode = iota"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tRule"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tDirect"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "// UnmarshalText unserialize Mode"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "func (m *TunnelMode) UnmarshalText(data []byte) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tmode, exist := ModeMapping[strings.ToLower(string(data))]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tif !exist {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\treturn errors.New(\"invalid mode\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t*m = mode"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "// MarshalText serialize Mode"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "func (m TunnelMode) MarshalText() ([]byte, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\treturn []byte(m.String()), nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "func (m TunnelMode) String() string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tswitch m {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tcase Global:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\treturn \"global\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\tcase Rule:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\t\treturn \"rule\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\tcase Direct:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\t\treturn \"direct\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tdefault:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\treturn \"Unknown\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 48
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 16129,
            "text": "- 新增持久化字段 **&#96;proxyUiMode&#96;**（类型 &#96;TunnelState.Mode&#96;，默认 &#96;Rule&#96;）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16130,
            "text": "- 与电脑端一致：**按钮选中状态只由前端自己存的模式决定**，不依赖 core 返回的 mode（core 在直连/全局下会返回 rule）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16132,
            "text": "## 2. ProxyActivity 使用 proxyUiMode"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16134,
            "text": "**文件：** &#96;app/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/ProxyActivity.kt&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16136,
            "text": "- **进入代理页时**：传给 &#96;ProxyDesign&#96; 的初始模式改为使用 **&#96;uiStore.proxyUiMode&#96;**，不再用 &#96;queryOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session).mode&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16137,
            "text": "- **用户点击规则/全局/直连时**（处理 &#96;Request.PatchMode&#96;）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16138,
            "text": "  1. 先 **把当前选中的 mode 写入 &#96;uiStore.proxyUiMode&#96;**；"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16139,
            "text": "  2. 再照旧执行 &#96;queryOverride&#96; → 设置 &#96;o.mode = it.mode&#96; → &#96;patchOverride(Session, o)&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16141,
            "text": "这样："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16143,
            "text": "- 三个按钮的选中状态由 **UiStore.proxyUiMode** 决定，和电脑端「前端自己记一个 mode」一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16144,
            "text": "- Session override 里仍然会写入用户选择的 mode（global/direct/rule），native 的 **patchDirectGlobalMode** 会在生成配置时把 global/direct 转成 rule + MATCH + 对应 DNS，行为与电脑端一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16145,
            "text": "- 代理组列表在三种模式下都保持同一套（因为 core 实际始终是 rule），不会在直连/全局下变成空或只显示 GLOBAL。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16147,
            "text": "**之前已完成的 native 部分（process.go 的 &#96;patchDirectGlobalMode&#96;）** 保持不变：直连/全局时强制 &#96;mode=rule&#96;、单条 MATCH 规则、以及对应的 nameserver，只清空 nameserver-policy。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16149,
            "text": "现在 Android 端三个按钮的交互和逻辑表现已经和电脑端一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16151,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16153,
            "text": "_**User**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16155,
            "text": "直连/全局时强制 mode=rule、单条 MATCH 规则、以及对应的 nameserver，只清空 nameserver-policy。 这些是实现了吗"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16157,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16159,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16161,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16163,
            "text": "The user is asking whether the following has been implemented (on Android):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16164,
            "text": "1. When in direct/global mode: force mode=rule"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16165,
            "text": "2. Single MATCH rule"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16166,
            "text": "3. Corresponding nameserver"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16167,
            "text": "4. Only clear nameserver-policy"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 16168
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 16127
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-06_06-40-57Z-global-and-direct-mode-configuration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.41372060775756836
    },

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "import { useSystemState } from \"@/hooks/use-system-state\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "import { showNotice } from \"@/services/notice-service\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "import { ProviderButton } from \"@/components/proxy/provider-button\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "import { ProviderButton as RuleProviderButton } from \"@/components/rule/provider-button\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "import { ProxyGroups } from \"@/components/proxy/proxy-groups\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "const MODES = [\"rule\", \"global\", \"direct\"] as const;"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 4341,
            "text": "Let me double-check our code. We have:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4342,
            "text": "- match_rule = \"MATCH,⬆️\" for direct"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4343,
            "text": "- match_rule = \"MATCH,🔀\" for global"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4345,
            "text": "So we're already using 🔀 and ⬆️ as the policy names in the MATCH rule. So the core will route all traffic to whichever policy is named 🔀 (usually a proxy group) or ⬆️ (usually direct). We're NOT setting mode to \"global\" or \"direct\" in the config we send - we're only changing the rules. So the core stays in rule mode and uses the MATCH rule to send traffic to 🔀 or ⬆️. Good."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4347,
            "text": "But wait - do we still set mode in the config? Let me check. In change_clash_mode we do:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4348,
            "text": "  mapping.insert(Value::from(\"mode\"), Value::from(mode.as_str()));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4349,
            "text": "  Config::clash().await.edit_draft(|d| d.patch_config(\u0026mapping));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4350,
            "text": "So we save mode (\"global\" or \"direct\") to the clash config (for UI display). Then we call update_config() which runs enhance(). In enhance(), we merge clash_config (which now has mode: global or mode: direct) into the config via merge_default_config. So the **generated config** that goes to the core might have mode: global or mode: direct in it! So when the core loads the config, it might see mode: global and then use its built-in global behavior (use GLOBAL group) instead of our rules. That could be the issue! So we need to ensure that when we're in direct or global mode (our custom implementation), we should NOT pass mode: global or mode: direct to the core - we should pass mode: rule so that the core uses our rules (MATCH,🔀 or MATCH,⬆️) and doesn't override with its own GLOBAL/DIRECT behavior. So the fix would be: in apply_direct_global_overrides, after we set the rules and nameserver, we should also set config[\"mode\"] = \"rule\" so that the core receives mode: rule and uses our single MATCH rule to determine the outbound. Let me check merge_default_config - it merges clash_config into config, and clash_config has mode: global or mode: direct. So the config we're building in enhance() will have mode from clash_config. So when we apply_direct_global_overrides, we're only changing rules and nameserver - we're not overriding mode. So the config that goes to the core has mode: global or mode: direct! So the core might be ignoring our rules and just using its built-in global (use GLOBAL group) or direct (use DIRECT) behavior. That would explain why the user says \"现在使用的是 GLOBAL / DIRECT\" - the core is in mode global or mode direct, so it's using the GLOBAL group or DIRECT. We need to force mode: rule in the generated config when we apply direct/global overrides, so that the core uses our MATCH,🔀 or MATCH,⬆️ rules instead."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4351,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4352
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4353,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 4354
          },

            "line": 4339
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "// 获取当前代理节点信息的自定义Hook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "export const useCurrentProxy = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  // 从AppDataProvider获取数据"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  const { proxies, clashConfig, refreshProxy } = useAppData();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  // 获取当前模式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  const currentMode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  // 获取当前代理节点信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const currentProxyInfo = useMemo(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    if (!proxies) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName: null };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    const { global, groups, records } = proxies;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    // 默认信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    let primaryGroupName = \"GLOBAL\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    let currentName = global?.now;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    // 在规则模式下，寻找主要代理组（通常是第一个或者名字包含特定关键词的组）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    if (currentMode === \"rule\" \u0026\u0026 groups.length \u003e 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      // 查找主要的代理组（优先级：包含关键词 \u003e 第一个非GLOBAL组）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      const primaryKeywords = ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        \"auto\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        \"select\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        \"proxy\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        \"节点选择\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        \"自动选择\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "      ];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "      const primaryGroup ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        groups.find((group: ProxyGroup) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "          ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        ) || groups.filter((g: ProxyGroup) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "      if (primaryGroup) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        primaryGroupName = primaryGroup.name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        currentName = primaryGroup.now;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    // 如果找不到当前节点，返回null"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    if (!currentName) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    // 获取完整的节点信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    const currentProxy = records[currentName] || {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      name: currentName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      type: \"Unknown\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "      udp: false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      xudp: false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      tfo: false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "      mptcp: false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      smux: false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      history: [],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    return { currentProxy, primaryGroupName };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  }, [proxies, currentMode]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  return {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    currentProxy: currentProxyInfo.currentProxy,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    primaryGroupName: currentProxyInfo.primaryGroupName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    mode: currentMode,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    refreshProxy,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "};"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 75
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,

          }

        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\clash-verge-rev\\src\\hooks\\use-current-proxy.ts",

      },
      "score": 0.4023176431655884
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2848,
            "text": "### &#96;src-tauri/src/feat/clash.rs&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2849,
            "text": "- **直连/全局**：不再调用 &#96;mihomo.patch_base_config({ mode })&#96;；改为先把 mode 写入 clash 配置，再 &#96;CoreManager::global().update_config()&#96;，这样会重新 &#96;Config::generate()&#96; 并应用带覆盖的配置，核心只收到「改 rules + dns」后的配置，**不切换代理组**。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2850,
            "text": "- **规则/脚本 (rule/script)**：仍用原来的 &#96;patch_base_config&#96; 只改 mode。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2851
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2852,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2853
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2854,
            "text": "## 2. 前端：直连/全局下代理组不切换、列表不变"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2855
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2856,
            "text": "### &#96;src/components/proxy/proxy-groups.tsx&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2857,
            "text": "- 去掉 &#96;mode === \"direct\"&#96; 时的提前返回和「直连模式」空状态，直连时也继续渲染与规则模式相同的代理组列表。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2858
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2859,
            "text": "### &#96;src/components/home/current-proxy-card.tsx&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2860,
            "text": "- 初始化/刷新时不再在直连/全局下把选中组强制成 &#96;GLOBAL&#96; 或 &#96;DIRECT&#96;，改为和规则模式一样用「保存的组」或「主组」。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2861,
            "text": "- 代理数据变化时不再根据直连/全局强制 &#96;group = DIRECT/GLOBAL&#96;，始终按当前选中的组和该组的 &#96;now&#96; 更新显示；并始终注册并显示 GLOBAL（若存在），和规则模式一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2862
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2863,
            "text": "### &#96;src/components/proxy/use-render-list.ts&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2864,
            "text": "- 把「用规则模式那一套 groups 列表」的条件改为包含 &#96;global&#96; 和 &#96;direct&#96;，这样在直连/全局下渲染的列表与规则模式相同（同一批 groups），不变成只显示 GLOBAL 或空。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2865
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2866,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2867
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2868,
            "text": "效果总结："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2869,
            "text": "- 选 **直连**：界面代理组列表和当前选中组都不变，只是运行配置里 rules 变成只有 &#96;MATCH,⬆️&#96;，dns 用你给的国内三个。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2870,
            "text": "- 选 **全局**：同样不切换组，运行配置里 rules 变成只有 &#96;MATCH,🔀&#96;，dns 用你给的四个国际。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2871,
            "text": "- 选 **规则**：行为与之前一致，由配置里的规则和 proxy-groups 决定。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2872
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2873,
            "text": "本地有 Rust 环境的话，在 &#96;clash-verge-rev&#96; 下执行 &#96;cargo check&#96; 或 &#96;cargo build&#96; 即可确认后端编译通过。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2874
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2875,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2876
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2877,
            "text": "_**User**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2878
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2879,
            "text": "现在如果当我切换回规则模式的时候不应该再做任何的修改了但是现在切换回规则模式好像还是被修改掉的比如说我切到全局再切到规则然后使用的现在还是全局模式的配置不会再进行恢复"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2880
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2881,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2882
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2883,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2884
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2885,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2885
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2846
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-06_06-40-57Z-global-and-direct-mode-configuration.md",

            "text": "package config"

            "lineNumber": 2
          },

            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "var ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tdirectNameservers = []string{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\t\t\"https://dns.alidns.com/dns-query\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\t\t\"https://120.53.53.53/dns-query\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\t\t\"tls://119.29.29.29:853\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\tglobalNameservers = []string{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\t\t\"https://1.1.1.1/dns-query\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\t\t\"https://8.8.8.8/dns-query\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\t\t\"https://9.9.9.9/dns-query\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\t\t\"tls://1.0.0.1:853\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "var processors = []processor{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tpatchExternalController, // must before patchOverride, so we only apply ExternalController in Override settings"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tpatchOverride,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\tpatchDirectGlobalMode, // after patchOverride: force rule mode + override rules/dns when session mode is direct/global"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tpatchProxyAdsBlock,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tpatchProxyGroupTimeout,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tpatchGeneral,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tpatchProfile,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\tpatchDns,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tpatchTun,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\tpatchListeners,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tpatchProviders,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tvalidConfig,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "type processor func(cfg *config.RawConfig, profileDir string) error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "const proxyAdsBlockRule = \"RULE-SET,ads,REJECT\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "type overrideProxyAdsBlock struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\tProxyAdsBlock *bool &#96;json:\"proxy-ads-block\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "func patchOverride(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(ReadOverride(OverrideSlotPersist))).Decode(cfg); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Apply persist override: %s\", err.Error())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(ReadOverride(OverrideSlotSession))).Decode(cfg); err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Apply session override: %s\", err.Error())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\treturn nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "// patchDirectGlobalMode: when session mode is direct/global, force mode=rule and override rules + dns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "// so that traffic uses MATCH,⬆️ or MATCH,🔀 (same behavior as desktop)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "func patchDirectGlobalMode(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tswitch cfg.Mode {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\tcase T.Direct:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\tcfg.Mode = T.Rule"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 19,
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\core\\src\\main\\golang\\native\\config\\process.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4009334146976471
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 4415,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4417,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4418
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4419,
            "text": "Good. Now the flow is:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4420,
            "text": "1. User selects \"global\" in UI -\u003e we save mode: global to clash config (for UI), then regenerate config."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4421,
            "text": "2. merge_default_config puts mode: global into the config."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4422,
            "text": "3. apply_direct_global_overrides runs: we set mode to \"rule\", rules to [\"MATCH,🔀\"], and nameserver. So the config that goes to the core has mode: rule and rules: [MATCH,🔀]. So the core will be in rule mode and route all traffic to the policy named 🔀 (which is typically a proxy group - the user's \"global\" proxy group). So the actual node used is the **currently selected node in the group 🔀**, not the core's GLOBAL group."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4423,
            "text": "4. Similarly for direct: we set mode: rule, rules to [\"MATCH,⬆️\"]. So the core routes all traffic to the policy ⬆️ (direct). So we're using the policy ⬆️, not the core's DIRECT."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4424
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4425,
            "text": "This matches what the user asked for."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4426,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4427
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4428,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4429
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4430,
            "text": "已经按你的需求改好了，逻辑如下。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4431
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4432,
            "text": "**原因**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4433,
            "text": "下发给核心的配置里带着 &#96;mode: global&#96; / &#96;mode: direct&#96;（来自 &#96;merge_default_config&#96; 合并的 clash 配置）。核心会按**内置的 mode** 处理："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4434,
            "text": "- &#96;mode: global&#96; → 全部走 **GLOBAL** 组  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4435,
            "text": "- &#96;mode: direct&#96; → 全部走 **DIRECT**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4436
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4437,
            "text": "这样会忽略我们写的 &#96;MATCH,🔀&#96; / &#96;MATCH,⬆️&#96; 规则，所以你会看到“全局用的是 GLOBAL / 直连用的是 DIRECT”。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4438
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4439,
            "text": "**修改**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4440,
            "text": "在直连/全局的覆盖逻辑里**强制写入 &#96;mode: rule&#96;**，这样核心始终按规则匹配，不会再用内置的 GLOBAL/DIRECT："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4441
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4442,
            "text": "- **全局**：配置里只有一条规则 &#96;MATCH,🔀&#96; → 全部走你配置里的**策略 🔀**（一般是名为 🔀 的代理组），用的就是**该组里当前选中的节点**，而不是核心的 GLOBAL。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4443,
            "text": "- **直连**：只有一条规则 &#96;MATCH,⬆️&#96; → 全部走**策略 ⬆️**（直连），而不是核心的 DIRECT 名字。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4444
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4445,
            "text": "**小结**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4446
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4447,
            "text": "| 模式 | 下发给核心的 mode | 规则 | 实际使用的策略/节点 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4448,
            "text": "|------|-------------------|------|----------------------|"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 4448
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 4414
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-06_06-40-57Z-global-and-direct-mode-configuration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3937629461288452
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 4331,
            "text": "So our current implementation is correct - we're not switching to core's mode: global or mode: direct. We're keeping rule mode and just replacing rules with MATCH,🔀 or MATCH,⬆️. So the \"node\" used is:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4332,
            "text": "- For global: the **selected node in the group that 🔀 refers to**. So 🔀 is a policy name - it could be the group \"GLOBAL\" (if their config names it 🔀) or a group literally named \"🔀\". The core will use whatever node is currently selected in that group."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4333,
            "text": "- For direct: ⬆️ is the direct policy - no specific \"node\", traffic goes direct."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4334
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4335,
            "text": "The user might be confused because in the UI we might still be showing or syncing with \"GLOBAL\" or \"DIRECT\" from the core's mode. Let me check - we changed the frontend so that in direct/global mode we don't switch the UI to show only GLOBAL or DIRECT group - we keep showing the same groups. And we're not calling patch_base_config with mode anymore for direct/global - we're doing full config regeneration with overridden rules. So the core receives a config with mode: rule (or whatever was in the config) and rules: [\"MATCH,🔀\"] or [\"MATCH,⬆️\"]. So the core is in rule mode, and the effective \"outbound\" for all traffic is the policy 🔀 or ⬆️. So:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4336,
            "text": "- The policy 🔀 in Clash is usually the name of a proxy group - so the core will use the **currently selected proxy** in that group. So \"which node\" = the selected node in the group named 🔀."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4337,
            "text": "- The policy ⬆️ is typically the direct policy (DIRECT). So no proxy node, just direct."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4338
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4339,
            "text": "So logically we're already doing the right thing: we're not using the core's GLOBAL or DIRECT mode; we're using MATCH,🔀 and MATCH,⬆️ so that traffic goes to the policy 🔀 (proxy group) or ⬆️ (direct). The user wants confirmation that we're not \"using GLOBAL or DIRECT\" in the sense of the core's mode - we're using the **policy names** 🔀 and ⬆️ in the MATCH rule. So I should confirm this in the code/reply."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4340
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4341,
            "text": "Let me double-check our code. We have:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4342,
            "text": "- match_rule = \"MATCH,⬆️\" for direct"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4343,
            "text": "- match_rule = \"MATCH,🔀\" for global"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4345,
            "text": "So we're already using 🔀 and ⬆️ as the policy names in the MATCH rule. So the core will route all traffic to whichever policy is named 🔀 (usually a proxy group) or ⬆️ (usually direct). We're NOT setting mode to \"global\" or \"direct\" in the config we send - we're only changing the rules. So the core stays in rule mode and uses the MATCH rule to send traffic to 🔀 or ⬆️. Good."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 4345
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 4329
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-06_06-40-57Z-global-and-direct-mode-configuration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3913036584854126
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 3021,
            "text": "Frontend:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3022,
            "text": "1. current-proxy-card: When showing groups and proxy list, don't use \"GLOBAL\" for global mode - use the same groups as rule mode. So we need to not switch to GLOBAL when isGlobalMode. So we treat the UI as if we're in rule mode for the purpose of which groups to show. So isGlobalMode would only affect the label (show \"全局模式\" chip) but the group selector would still show all groups and the selected group's proxies. So we need to change the logic: remove the branch that sets group to \"GLOBAL\" and proxy to proxies.global.now when isGlobalMode - instead keep the selection as the current group (or primary group). This is a significant UI change - I'll need to not set selection to GLOBAL when isGlobalMode, and not build proxyOptions from proxies.global when isGlobalMode. So we use the same proxyOptions and selection as in rule mode."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3023,
            "text": "2. proxies page: same - when mode is global or direct, still show the same groups as in rule mode (don't switch to GLOBAL view)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3024
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3025,
            "text": "Let me start with the backend changes, then the frontend."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3026,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3027
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3028,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3029
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3030,
            "text": "正在实现该需求：先在后端实现“直连/全局模式”通过覆盖运行配置的 rules 和 dns 实现；然后在前端保持代理界面不切换 group。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3031
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3032
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3033,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3034
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3035,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"unknown\" data-tool-name=\"todo_write\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3036,
            "text": "\u003cdetails\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3037,
            "text": "\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **todo_write**\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3038
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3039
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3040,
            "text": "Parameters:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3041
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3042,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3043,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3044,
            "text": "  \"merge\": true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3045,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3046,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3047,
            "text": "Result:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3048
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3049,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3050,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3051,
            "text": "  \"finalTodos\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3052,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3053,
            "text": "      \"content\": \"Backend: override rules+dns in config generation for direct/global mode\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3054,
            "text": "      \"id\": \"1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3055,
            "text": "      \"status\": \"in_progress\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3056,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3057,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3058,
            "text": "      \"content\": \"Backend: change_clash_mode to use generate+update_config for direct/global\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3059,
            "text": "      \"id\": \"2\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3060,
            "text": "      \"status\": \"pending\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3061,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3062,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3063,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3064,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3065,
            "text": "      \"status\": \"pending\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3066,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3070,

          },
          {

          {

            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"unknown\" data-tool-name=\"ripgrep_raw_search\"\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **ripgrep_raw_search**\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "So &#96;patchClashMode&#96; calls the backend &#96;patch_clash_mode&#96;. The runtime config is obtained via &#96;getRuntimeConfig()&#96; and can be patched via &#96;patchClashConfig(payload)&#96;. So the flow might be:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577,
            "text": "1. When user selects \"direct\" or \"global\" mode, currently &#96;patchClashMode(mode)&#96; is called - this likely tells the backend to switch mode, and the backend might be switching the proxy selection (GLOBAL/DIRECT) or rewriting the config."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "The user wants:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "- Don't switch the proxy groups in the UI when in direct/global mode (keep showing the same groups)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "- Instead, when in direct mode: patch the **running config** to have rules = only &#96;- MATCH,⬆️&#96;, remove nameserver-policy, set nameserver to the 3 Chinese DNS"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582,
            "text": "- When in global mode: patch the **running config** to have rules = only &#96;- MATCH,🔀&#96;, remove nameserver-policy, set nameserver to the 4 global DNS"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584,
            "text": "So the implementation could be:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 585,
            "text": "1. Backend: when &#96;patch_clash_mode&#96; is called with \"direct\" or \"global\", instead of (or in addition to) whatever it does now, patch the runtime config: rules + dns."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 586,
            "text": "2. Frontend: when in direct/global mode, don't hide or switch the proxy groups - show them as in rule mode (so the UI doesn't change)."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 586
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 529
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-06_06-40-57Z-global-and-direct-mode-configuration.md",

      "score": 0.3857438564300537
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 778,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 779
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 780,
            "text": "## 原因说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 781
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 782,
            "text": "在本项目里，**全局 / 直连**并不是让 core 里 tunnel 真的变成 &#96;global&#96; / &#96;direct&#96;，而是在 native 配置里通过 &#96;patchDirectGlobalMode&#96; 把模式**强制改回 &#96;rule&#96;**，再用规则/DNS 覆盖模拟全局与直连（与桌面端思路一致，见 &#96;core/src/main/golang/native/config/process.go&#96;）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 783
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 784,
            "text": "因此 &#96;queryTunnelState()&#96; 从 core 读到的 &#96;mode&#96; 在「全局」或「直连」时仍然是 **rule**。主界面之前用 &#96;state.mode&#96; 做文案，就会一直显示成「规则模式」。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 785
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 786,
            "text": "代理页已经用 &#96;UiStore.proxyUiMode&#96; 记录并展示用户选中的模式（并在切换时写入），与 core 上报的 &#96;mode&#96; 本就不一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 787
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 788,
            "text": "## 修改"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 789
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 790,
            "text": "在 &#96;MainActivity.fetch()&#96; 里，主界面代理模块的模式文案改为与代理页一致，使用 **&#96;uiStore.proxyUiMode&#96;**，并去掉已无意义的 &#96;queryTunnelState()&#96; 调用（&#96;TunnelState&#96; 里只有 &#96;mode&#96; 字段）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 791
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 792,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;90:105:c:\\Users\\Ken-Narmal\\Desktop\\ClashMetaForAndroid\\app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\github\\kr328\\clash\\MainActivity.kt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 793,
            "text": "    private suspend fun MainDesign.fetch() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 794,
            "text": "        setClashRunning(clashRunning)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 795
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 796,
            "text": "        val providers = withClash {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 797,
            "text": "            queryProviders()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 798,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 799
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 800,
            "text": "        // 全局/直连在 core 侧通过规则覆盖实现，tunnel 查询到的 mode 恒为 rule；与代理页一致使用 UiStore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 801,
            "text": "        setMode(uiStore.proxyUiMode)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 802,
            "text": "        setHasProviders(providers.isNotEmpty())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 803,
            "text": "        ..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 804,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 805
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 806,
            "text": "这样在代理里切换到全局/直连后，回到主界面（&#96;onStart&#96; 会触发 &#96;fetch()&#96;）会显示正确的「全局模式」「直连模式」等；&#96;proxyUiMode&#96; 本身会持久化，冷启动也会与上次选择一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 807
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 808,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 809
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 810,
            "text": "_**User**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 811
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 812,
            "text": "安卓中，现在每次重新开关代理，都是使用规则模式，而不会使用上次选择的模式，但是在代理模块中显得是还是上次的选择。请你确认是这样吗? 我需要把代理模块的文字显示也更新（主页以及代理模块内部）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 813
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 814,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 815
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 816,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 817
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 818,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 819,
            "text": "**Updating proxy mode display**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 820
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 821,
            "text": "I'm fixing the proxy mode display to match the actual mode instead of showing stale values. I'm implementing session mode restoration from uiStore.proxyUiMode on Clash start to match actual behavior. "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 821
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 777
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-04-04_23-43-37Z-proxy-module-mode-display-issue.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3855927884578705
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 5921,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5922
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5923,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5924
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5925,
            "text": "I see. The user is asking: when they click one of the three mode buttons (rule, global, direct), does that trigger/wake the fallback (health check / url-test / fallback group behavior)?"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5926
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5927,
            "text": "From the code:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5928,
            "text": "1. &#96;markProxyModeChanged()&#96; - marks that proxy mode was changed, and for 1 minute after that, fallback switch notifications are suppressed. It's used in proxies.tsx when \"auto close connection\" is toggled (line 165), in proxy-control-switches when TUN is toggled, and in use-system-proxy-state when system proxy is toggled."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5929,
            "text": "2. When the user clicks rule/global/direct in proxies.tsx, we call &#96;onChangeMode(mode)&#96; which calls &#96;patchClashMode(mode)&#96; and &#96;refreshClashConfig()&#96;. We do NOT call &#96;markProxyModeChanged()&#96; in that flow."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5930
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5931,
            "text": "So the question is twofold:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5932,
            "text": "1. Does switching mode **trigger** fallback (i.e. cause url-test/fallback groups to re-run health checks)? That would happen on the backend when we call update_config() - the config is regenerated and applied to the core. So the core gets a new config. When the core loads new config, it might re-run url-test/fallback group health checks. So yes, switching mode (which triggers update_config) could \"wake\" or trigger the core to re-evaluate fallback/url-test groups."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5933,
            "text": "2. Does switching mode cause the **fallback switch notification** to be sent? The notification is sent when the app-data-provider detects that url-test/fallback groups' \"now\" has changed. When we switch mode, we do refreshClashConfig() and the provider might refresh proxy data. If we don't call markProxyModeChanged(), then there's no 1-minute cooldown, so if the fallback groups' selected node changes (e.g. due to config reload), the user might get a \"fallback switched\" notification. So the user might want us to call markProxyModeChanged() when they click one of the three mode buttons, so that for 1 minute after switching mode, we don't show the fallback switch notification (because the switch might be a side effect of the config reload, not a \"real\" automatic fallback)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5934
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5935,
            "text": "Let me check proxies.tsx again - when we call onChangeMode, we don't call markProxyModeChanged(). So currently, switching between rule/global/direct does NOT mark \"proxy mode changed\", so the fallback notification cooldown is not activated. So if switching mode causes the core to reload config and that triggers fallback groups to re-select nodes, the user could get a fallback switch notification. The user is asking \"是否会唤醒 fallback\" - I interpret this as: (1) does it trigger fallback health check? and/or (2) does it cause fallback notification to appear or not?"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 5935
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 5920
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-06_06-40-57Z-global-and-direct-mode-configuration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.38338446617126465

在当前的 ClashMetaForAndroid（根据你代码库里的逻辑）中，切换「全局 (Global)」、「规则 (Rule)」和「直连 (Direct)」模式的逻辑为了**保持界面上的代理分组不变化**，做了一层非常巧妙的魔改和拦截。

以下是完整的切换逻辑链路：

### 1. 触发切换与状态保存 (UI 层)
当你在代理界面点击切换模式时，会触发 `ProxyActivity.kt` 中的 `PatchMode` 请求。
它首先会将你选择的模式保存在前端本地的偏好设置中（`uiStore.proxyUiMode = m`）。
*这里有一点很特殊：界面上高亮显示的模式，完全依赖这个本地保存的值，而不是去读取内核（Core）真实运行的模式。*

### 2. 下发配置并断开现有连接 (Service 层)
接着，App 会获取当前运行中的 Session 级别配置覆盖（Override），将 mode 修改为你选择的模式，并下发给 Clash 内核。
```kotlin
// app/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/ProxyActivity.kt
val o = queryOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session)
o.mode = it.mode
patchOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session, o)
// 切换模式后关闭所有连接，让流量按新规则重建
closeAllConnections()
```
这步最重要的操作是调用了 `closeAllConnections()`，强制掐断手机上所有的现有网络连接，确保新发起的请求能立刻应用新模式的规则。

### 3. 内核配置拦截与魔改 (Core/Go 层)
这是整个逻辑的**核心所在**。在原版 Clash 中，切换到全局模式会导致所有的代理组消失，只剩下一个 `GLOBAL` 组；切换直连则全部走 `DIRECT`。
为了避免代理界面的分组消失，该 Android 客户端在内核读取配置前，执行了 `patchDirectGlobalMode` 拦截函数：

```go
// core/src/main/golang/native/config/process.go
func patchDirectGlobalMode(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {
	switch cfg.Mode {
	case T.Direct:
		cfg.Mode = T.Rule // 强制把内核模式改回 Rule
		cfg.Rule = []string{"MATCH,⬆️"} // 用唯一的直连规则覆盖所有规则
		cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), directNameservers...)
		cfg.DNS.NameServerPolicy = nil
	case T.Global:
		cfg.Mode = T.Rule // 强制把内核模式改回 Rule
		cfg.Rule = []string{"MATCH,🔀"} // 用唯一的代理规则覆盖所有规则
		cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), globalNameservers...)
		cfg.DNS.NameServerPolicy = nil
    ...
```
当系统发现你传入的是 `Global` 或 `Direct` 模式时，它会偷偷做以下几件事：
1. **强行将内核的工作模式改回 `Rule`（规则模式）**：这就是为什么你在全局/直连模式下，依然能看到各种策略组（因为对内核来说它还在规则模式）。
2. **清空覆盖路由规则 (Rules)**：
   - **直连模式下**：把规则强制替换为 `MATCH,⬆️`。这代表所有流量不管三七二十一，直接匹配策略 `⬆️`（内部预设的直连出站）。
   - **全局模式下**：把规则强制替换为 `MATCH,🔀`。这代表所有流量直接匹配到 `🔀` 这个代理节点选择组，由你在界面上选中的节点来代理。
3. **覆盖 DNS 配置**：它会移除原有的 DNS Policy，并在：
   - 直连模式下：强制使用国内直连 DNS（如阿里 DNS `dns.alidns.com` 等）。
   - 全局模式下：强制使用海外抗污染 DNS（如 `1.1.1.1`, `8.8.8.8` 等）。

### 总结
**现在的模式切换逻辑本质上是“伪全局”和“伪直连”。**
在底层，内核**永远运行在 `Rule` 模式**下。当你切换到全局或直连时，App 实际上是通过**暴力的规则覆写（写死一个 MATCH 规则拦截所有流量）**以及**动态修改 DNS 解析**来实现流量的全局代理或全局直连。这样既满足了流量走向的要求，又完美保留了主界面的所有代理分组结构。

_**Agent (gemini-3.1-pro)**_

代码中明确表明是：**先更改模式，然后再切断所有连接**。

在 `app/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/ProxyActivity.kt` 的模式切换处理逻辑中，代码的执行顺序如下：

```kotlin
is ProxyDesign.Request.PatchMode -> {
    // 1. 先在前端 UI 状态中记录新的模式
    it.mode?.let { m -> uiStore.proxyUiMode = m }

    withClash {
        val o = queryOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session)
        
        // 2. 将新模式写入到 Session 级别的配置覆盖中
        o.mode = it.mode
        patchOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session, o)
        
        // 3. 切换模式后关闭所有连接，让流量按新规则重建
        closeAllConnections()
    }
}
```

### 为什么要这么做？
这是一个非常经典的防流量泄漏/防错位设计：
1. **先应用新配置**：确保此时内核的路由规则已经变成了你选择的新模式（比如“直连”或“全局”）。
2. **后切断连接**：直接暴力掐断手机上所有的现有网络连接（Socket）。
3. **App 自动重连**：当微信、浏览器等 App 发现连接断开时，它们会立刻发起新的网络请求重连。因为第 1 步已经提前把规则改好了，所以**重连的流量会立刻匹配到新的模式规则**。

如果反过来（先切断连接再改模式），在连接切断到模式修改完成的几毫秒时间差内，如果有 App 恰好发起了请求，这部分流量依然会顺着**旧的模式**跑出去，从而导致流量走向错误。

_**Agent (gemini-3.1-pro)**_

在安卓端，DNS 的覆盖是通过 **广播触发内核配置重载（Soft Reload）** 并结合 **配置预处理拦截（Processor）** 来实现的。

详细的链路如下：

### 1. 修改会话配置并发送广播
当你在界面上点击切换模式时，UI 层调用 `ClashManager` 的 `patchOverride` 方法。
它不仅将你选择的模式写入了内存中的 Session Override（会话级覆盖配置），同时还会发送一个系统广播：`ACTION_OVERRIDE_CHANGED`。
```kotlin
// service/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/service/ClashManager.kt
override fun patchOverride(slot: Clash.OverrideSlot, configuration: ConfigurationOverride) {
    Clash.patchOverride(slot, configuration) // 写给 Go 层的内存
    // ...
    context.sendOverrideChanged() // 发送广播
}
```

### 2. 后台 Service 收到广播并触发 Load
在后台一直运行的 `ConfigurationModule` 监听到了 `ACTION_OVERRIDE_CHANGED` 广播。它收到信号后，会立刻调用 `Clash.load()` 方法，请求 Go 内核重新加载当前正在使用的配置文件。
```kotlin
// service/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/service/clash/module/ConfigurationModule.kt
val session = Clash.queryOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session)
// ...
Clash.patchOverride(Clash.OverrideSlot.Session, session)
Clash.load(service.importedDir.resolve(active.uuid.toString())).await() // 触发内核 Reload
```

### 3. Go 内核在加载配置时进行拦截和篡改 (Processor)
当 Go 层的 `Load` 被触发时，它会去解析本地的 `config.yaml`。但在把这份配置喂给真正的 Mihomo 核心（`hub.ApplyConfig`）之前，会先经过一系列的拦截器（Processors）。

其中一个拦截器正是 `patchDirectGlobalMode`，这就是 DNS 被覆盖的发生地：
```go
// core/src/main/golang/native/config/process.go
func patchDirectGlobalMode(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {
	switch cfg.Mode {
	case T.Direct: // 直连模式
		cfg.Mode = T.Rule
		cfg.Rule = []string{"MATCH,⬆️"}
        // 暴力覆盖 Nameserver
		cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), directNameservers...) // 阿里/腾讯DNS
		cfg.DNS.NameServerPolicy = nil // 清空 DNS 策略
	case T.Global: // 全局模式
		cfg.Mode = T.Rule
		cfg.Rule = []string{"MATCH,🔀"}
        // 暴力覆盖 Nameserver
		cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), globalNameservers...) // 1.1.1.1/8.8.8.8
		cfg.DNS.NameServerPolicy = nil // 清空 DNS 策略
	}
	return nil
}
```
在这里，无论你原本的配置文件里写了多么复杂的 `nameserver` 或者 `nameserver-policy`，只要是直连/全局模式，它就会：
- 把你的 `nameserver-policy` (指定域名使用特定 DNS 的策略) 直接清空为 `nil`。
- 将 `nameserver` 数组强制替换为代码中写死的固定 DNS 列表。
  - **直连**会被替换为国内 DNS：`https://dns.alidns.com/dns-query`, `120.53.53.53`, `119.29.29.29`。
  - **全局**会被替换为海外抗污染 DNS：`1.1.1.1`, `8.8.8.8`, `9.9.9.9` 等。

### 4. 应用修改后的配置
拦截篡改完成后，这份"动过手脚"的 Config 对象才会被交到 `hub.ApplyConfig(cfg)`。
Mihomo 核心内部的 DNS 模块（`resolver`）收到新的配置后，会销毁旧的 DNS 解析器并根据这些强制指定的 DNS URL 重建连接。

### 总结
你感觉只是切换了一下模式，但实际上 **App 在后台触发了一次无感的配置重载**。在重载的过程中，拦截器悄悄把内存中配置树的 `DNS` 节点给替换掉了，最后让内核根据这份被修改过的配置去头掐尾的配置重新启动了 DNS 服务重新跑起来配置重新初始化 DNS 模块。

---

_**User**_

直连应该使用 direct-nameserver: &china-dns
  - https://dns.alidns.com/dns-query
  - https://120.53.53.53/dns-query
  - tls://119.29.29.29:853

全局使用 
nameserver: &intl-dns
  - https://1.1.1.1/dns-query
  - https://8.8.8.8/dns-query
  - https://9.9.9.9/dns-query
  - tls://1.0.0.1:853

_**Agent (gemini-3.1-pro)**_

你说得非常对！从合理的逻辑和高自由度的角度来说，**直连确实应该读取配置文件里的 `direct-nameserver`，而全局模式应该读取配置里的 `nameserver`**，而不是直接在代码里写死。

但目前的实际情况是，**这部分逻辑在代码里被强行“硬编码 (Hardcoded)”了**。

在当前的代码库中，开发者为了省事或者为了确保小白用户切换模式后绝对能用，直接在 `core/src/main/golang/native/config/process.go` 文件开头写死了这两个数组：

```go
// core/src/main/golang/native/config/process.go
var (
	directNameservers = []string{
		"https://dns.alidns.com/dns-query",
		"https://120.53.53.53/dns-query",
		"tls://119.29.29.29:853",
	}
	globalNameservers = []string{
		"https://1.1.1.1/dns-query",
		"https://8.8.8.8/dns-query",
		"https://9.9.9.9/dns-query",
		"tls://1.0.0.1:853",
	}
)
```

并在 `patchDirectGlobalMode` 函数中直接用上面写死的数组覆盖了 `cfg.DNS.NameServer`：
```go
	case T.Direct:
		// ...
		cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), directNameservers...) // 这里强制覆写了
	case T.Global:
		// ...
		cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), globalNameservers...) // 这里强制覆写了
```

### 如果你想让它读取配置文件的逻辑，需要如何修改代码？

如果你想让它按照你的思路（优先使用配置文件中用户自定义的 `direct-nameserver` 和 `nameserver`，如果没有才使用默认的 fallback），你需要修改 `core/src/main/golang/native/config/process.go` 里的 `patchDirectGlobalMode` 函数。

修改思路如下（由于我目前处于**Ask模式（只读问答模式）**，我只能为你提供代码参考，你可以手动复制去修改）：

```go
func patchDirectGlobalMode(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {
	switch cfg.Mode {
	case T.Direct:
		cfg.Mode = T.Rule
		cfg.Rule = []string{"MATCH,⬆️"}
		
		// 判断用户配置里有没有 direct-nameserver，有就用用户的，没有再用写死的国内 DNS
		if len(cfg.DNS.DirectNameServer) > 0 {
			cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), cfg.DNS.DirectNameServer...)
		} else {
			cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), directNameservers...)
		}
		
		cfg.DNS.NameServerPolicy = nil
		log.Infoln("Applied direct mode overrides (rules + dns)")
		
	case T.Global:
		cfg.Mode = T.Rule
		cfg.Rule = []string{"MATCH,🔀"}
		
		// 判断用户配置里有没有 nameserver，有就保留用户的 nameserver 不变，没有再用写死的国际 DNS
		if len(cfg.DNS.NameServer) == 0 {
			cfg.DNS.NameServer = append([]string(nil), globalNameservers...)
		}
		// 如果原本就有 cfg.DNS.NameServer，则什么都不用做，直接保留
		
		cfg.DNS.NameServerPolicy = nil
		log.Infoln("Applied global mode overrides (rules + dns)")
		
	default:
		// rule or other: no override
	}
	return nil
}
```

这样修改后：
1. **切到直连时**：它会去看你 yaml 里的 `direct-nameserver`，如果有，就把全局 DNS 替换成 `direct-nameserver` 里的内容。
2. **切到全局时**：它会直接保留你 yaml 里的 `nameserver`，不再拿硬编码的 `1.1.1.1` 去强暴覆盖。
